title: NTA SHRESHTA Admit Card 2025 Released @ exams.nta.ac.in

detail.title: NTA SHRESHTA Admit Card 2025 Released @ exams.nta.ac.in
detail.short_info: NTA SHRESHTA Admit Card 2025 - National Entrance Test for Scheme for Residential Education for Students in Higher Classes in Targeted Area Admit Card 2025 released on OFFICIAL RELEASED DATE by the National Testing Agency (NTA) Authority and all the registered students who had submitted their NTA NTA SHRESHTA Application Forms successfully will receive their Admit Card/Hall Ticket which can be downloaded from the official website. The NTA SHRESHTA Admit Card 2025 is an important document to be brought by the candidate when appearing for the Examination. For more details and information related to the NTA SHRESHTA Admit Card 2025, read this article.

sections.heading: NTA SHRESHTA Admit Card 2025 Released @ exams.nta.ac.in

content.text: New Update: National Entrance Test for Scheme for Residential Education for Students in Higher Classes in Targeted Area Admit Card 2025 released by the National Testing Agency (NTA) Authority on 26-05-2025 and the candidates will be able to download it from the National Testing Agency (NTA) Official Website. All the candidates who had successfully submitted their Application Forms will be receiving their Admit Cards that will be available in the National Testing Agency (NTA) official Website and it has been released by the Authority. If candidate faces any query regarding the National Entrance Test for Scheme for Residential Education for Students in Higher Classes in Targeted Area Admit Card 2025, then he or she has to contact the concerned Authority without fail. The NTA SHRESHTA Admit Card 2025 will be present in Online mode only and will not be provided to candidates through any other offline modes.
Check and Download - NTA SHRESHTA Admit Card 2025

rows: National Entrance Test for Scheme for Residential Education for Students in Higher Classes in Targeted Area

sections.heading: How to download NTA SHRESHTA Admit Card/Hall Ticket 2025?

content.text: Following are the steps to download the NTA SHRESHTA Admit Card 2025:

items: Visit the official site of NTA.
National Testing Agency (NTA) home page will display.
By scrolling down the home page, find the Admission section.
Search for the National Entrance Test for Scheme for Residential Education for Students in Higher Classes in Targeted Area Admit Card 2025 link.
NTA SHRESHTA 2025 Admit Card will be displayed.
Download and take a print out.
